metadata.title: Documents | AdonERP
metadata.description: AI-powered document management platform integrated with your ERP — from smart capture and e-signatures to automated workflows and secure collaboration.

hero.title: Files organized.
hero.description: Adon ERP Documents gives your team one secure hub to scan, store, approve, sign, share, and find every business file.

documentHubSection.title: Your
documentHubSection.description: Bring every file into one intelligent workspace. Capture documents from email, scanning, uploads, clients, teams, and ERP workflows.

signingSection.title: Print, sign, scan?
signingSection.subtitle: Sign online!
signingSection.description: Send contracts, offers, approvals, and agreements for signature. Adon ERP keeps every signed document attached to the right client, task, or project.
features: Send signature requests in one click
Track signed, pending, and expired documents

organizationSection.title: Organization is the key
organizationSection.description: Keep departments, clients, tasks, and approvals connected. Your team always knows where every file belongs and what needs action.

collaborationSection.title: The art of effective
collaborationSection.description: Discuss documents with teammates, assign ownership, request approvals, and keep all comments connected to the file.

demo.title: Website contract draft
demo.comment: Please review the pricing section before sending it to the client.

timeSavingSection.title: Time-saving tool
timeSavingSection.description: Measure exactly how much time your team saves by automating capture, routing, signing, approvals, and archiving.
steps: Adon ERP identifies the type and owner
The file is routed to the right workflow
Approvals, signatures, and archive rules run automatically

list.title: Split PDFs
list.description: Separate contracts, invoices, and forms into clean documents in seconds.

list.title: Auto folder rules
list.description: Route files to the right workspace using tags, clients, projects, and teams.

list.title: Smart search
list.description: Find any document by title, content, owner, client, or approval status.

list.title: Secure sharing
list.description: Share files with role-based permissions, expiry links, and audit trails.

list.title: E-sign workflows
list.description: Send, sign, approve, and archive documents without leaving Adon ERP.

list.title: Activity insights
list.description: Track views, approvals, comments, and document performance in one place.

ctaBanner.title: Join modern teams
ctaBanner.description: Teams use Adon ERP Documents to organize operations, reduce file chaos, and move work forward faster.

footerCta.title: Rediscover bliss
footerCta.subtitle: in your work
footerCta.description: Replace scattered folders with a secure, searchable, automated document workspace inside Adon ERP.
